leasemd.contexto: B2B medical equipment leasing company in Mexico. Aggressive competition on search engines and zero visibility inside LLMs. B2B medical equipment research is moving from Google to ChatGPT/Gemini/Perplexity as the first evaluation step.
leasemd.accion: AEO/GEO diagnosis + site restructure + content stack built for Answer Engines (FAQ schema, comparisons, glossary, case proof). Citation Share tracked across the 3 main LLMs.
resultados: Rank #1 across ChatGPT, Gemini and Perplexity for "best medical equipment leasing Mexico"
+320% qualified inbound in 6 months (Google + LLMs combined)
Dominant Citation Share vs Lendar/Konfío and national competitors
Average inbound lead = decision-maker (CMO/CFO of a private hospital)
leasemd.quote: People used to ask Google. Now they ask ChatGPT — and we show up first. It's a different game.

nextco.contexto: Mexican B2B manufacturer. Small sales team. Burning $180 USD per cold lead on Google/Meta Ads with no predictable pipeline. Needed to break the capacity ceiling without hiring more reps.
nextco.accion: 3-layer system: (1) Magallanes — B2B buying signals across 800+ target accounts. (2) Contextual LinkedIn outreach triggered by verified signal. (3) Automated qualification before handing the lead to Carlo. Zero ad spend.
resultados: 842 qualified leads in 10 months, $0 USD in ads
BOSCH · Continental · SuKarne in active pipeline
Sales team now only works pre-qualified leads
nextco.quote: We went from chasing to closing. Leads arrive warm, with context, and my team stopped burning time on cold prospects.

top-energy.contexto: Industrial solar / multinational. Long sales cycle (6-18 months) on $1M-$10M USD tickets. Impossible to compete with traditional ads for the specific intent of industrial plants.
top-energy.accion: Ultra-targeted organic LinkedIn aimed at Plant Managers / Sustainability Directors in energy-intensive industries. Contextual messaging tied to publicly announced expansion projects + ESG commitments. No cold pitch.
resultados: $9M USD project closed from ONE LinkedIn message
2 additional projects in Mexico after the initial close
Sustained pipeline — no volume, just precision
top-energy.quote: One message. Nine million dollars. That's the day I understood how powerful LinkedIn is when used right.

seidor.contexto: International tech consultancy with a cybersecurity practice in Mexico. Competing against the Big 4 (Deloitte/PwC/EY/KPMG) who dominate SERP with historical authority and massive content libraries.

resultados: Google Page 1 above Deloitte on strategic keywords
Qualified inbound pipeline activated for cyber services
SEIDOR established as technical authority on Mexican search

mercedes-benz.contexto: Mercedes-Benz Mexico dealer selling Sprinters and fleets to hotels, transport companies and premium F&B. Digital ads saturated, low-quality leads mixed with consumer traffic.

resultados: $150K USD closed from ONE LinkedIn message to a hotel (3 Sprinters at $50K each)
Exclusive base of 500+ B2B VIP profiles active
Zero consumer noise in the funnel

dcatala.contexto: B2B office furniture and acoustic booth manufacturer in Mexico. Competing in SERP against marketplace giants (Amazon, Mercado Libre) that dominate transactional keywords through domain authority.

resultados: Ranked above Amazon and Mercado Libre on "meeting rooms" and "acoustic booths"
High commercial intent B2B keywords won
Corporate inbound activated (vs consumer leads from marketplaces)

pazz-leasing.contexto: Auto leasing company in Mexico competing against the official manufacturer sites (Peugeot, Renault) that normally dominate SERP via brand and authority.

resultados: Rank #1 above the official Peugeot Mexico site on "leasing peugeot partner"
High commercial intent keywords taken from the manufacturer

resultados: "pallets Mexico" from nothing to Top 10 in under 45 days
#7 on Google on a highly contested core keyword
Revlon closed in 3 months via LinkedIn (global account)

spakio.contexto: Mexico-based logistics and warehousing operator with large industrial warehouses that needed international importers as anchor tenants to fill capacity. Zero budget for international ads — and ads in China aren't an option (Google blocked, closed ecosystem). The challenge: how to show up in front of a Chinese buyer without paying.
spakio.accion: Technical SEO targeting English and Simplified Chinese queries for logistics/warehousing/3PL Mexico. Service schema + bilingual landings (EN/中文) + AEO with FAQs covering import flows, certifications and cross-docking. The Chinese buyer finds Spakio on Google/Baidu before flying to Mexico.
resultados: Chinese importer found Spakio via pure organic SEO — zero ad spend
The Chinese importer landed in CDMX to close Amazon, OXXO and Liverpool inside the operation
Recurring client + referrals across LATAM import circles post-landing

resultados: Top 3 across the 3 LLMs for "LATAM AEO agency" and "B2B AI marketing"
If it works here — it works for you

bcs-bioclean.contexto: Industrial passivation, pickling, derouging and electropolishing in Canada. Ultra-technical B2B niche — buyers are maintenance engineers at pharma, biotech and critical-process plants. Competing against providers with decades of authority (Astro Pak, Purepass, Electro-Max). In this market the buyer doesn't shortlist 30 options — they open Google or ChatGPT, read the AI Overview, and the short list is locked right there. Showing up in that AI Overview = sitting at the evaluation table. Not showing up = not existing.
bcs-bioclean.accion: AEO + technical SEO across the full service cluster (passivation, pickling, derouging, electropolishing, chemical cleaning) + deep process content with technical comparisons (passivation vs pickling, ASTM A967 vs A380) that AI engines cite as authoritative sources + FAQPage schema + Oakville/Burlington GBP optimization to capture the Top Providers Canada geo filter.
resultados: Cited in AI Overview for "industrial passivation services"
Cited in Canada AI Overview for "best passivation services Canada" (Top Providers list)
Cited in AI Overview for "bio-processing passivation services" (sidebar + list)
#1 organic on "passivation vs pickling steel systems Canada"
Top 5 organic on "derouging services" and "derouging and passivation Canada" (two BCS results in SERP)
Top 3 organic on "ASTM A967 vs ASTM A380" (ultra-technical spec term)
Top 3 organic on "best passivation services Canada" and "bio clean services"
5.0★ local pack with full GBP panel on "bio clean services" (Oakville)
Full technical cluster owned: passivation · pickling · derouging · electropolishing · chemical cleaning
